summary: Tested the new Matching-Outcome Simulator (admin-only) end-to-end. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases pass — POST /api/admin/simulator/run, GET /runs, GET /runs/{id}, DELETE /runs/{id}, auth (401 unauth), validation (400 for num_requests=5/500), and the production therapist-filter fix produce a non-empty pool (122 active therapists, step1 mean > 0). Frontend: full flow works on desktop AND 375x667 mobile — login → More → Matching simulator → run with seed/num — sim-report renders with histogram, filter-bars, 5 suggestion cards, 20 per-request rows, expandable detail panels, prior-runs list, Load and Delete (with confirm) all functional. No console errors, no horizontal overflow on mobile.
action_items: PRODUCT FINDING (not a bug): Simulator reports 45% zero-pool rate against the 122-therapist seed with 'client type' as the dominant filter exclusion (1294 hits across a 20-request run). This is exactly the kind of issue the simulator is meant to surface — the team may want to recruit more therapists tagged for couples/family/group or relax the client_type HARD filter. Surfaced via simulator's own suggestion cards (CRITICAL severity), so working as designed.
critical_code_review_comments: simulator.py is ~900 lines — borderline; consider splitting synthetic-request generation, scoring, and audit-analysis helpers into separate modules if it grows further.

simulator.run_simulation is invoked synchronously from the POST route. A 50-request × 122-therapist run completes in ~0.05s (verified), but the 200-request upper bound could push toward 1s+ on a slower box; consider moving to a background task with a status-polling endpoint if request counts grow.

simulator_runs.insert_one(dict(report)) stores the full per-request report inline. With 200-request runs and Step-2 application detail this could approach Mongo's 16MB doc cap. Worth monitoring or chunking if larger runs are added.
test_credentials: Admin master password admin123! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Backend curl uses X-Admin-Password header.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates ephemeral simulator_runs + simulator_requests docs; module-scope fixture deletes the primary run on teardown. test_create_then_delete cleans its own run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simulator endpoints are at /api/admin/simulator/{run|runs|runs/{id}}. Auth via X-Admin-Password: admin123! header (or admin session cookie). UI panel testid='simulator-panel', accessible via top-level 'More' dropdown → 'Matching simulator' (testid='more-tab-simulator'). All sim-* testids documented in the original review request work as advertised. Both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x667) flows verified end-to-end with no console errors and no horizontal overflow.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. The previously-fixed therapist-filter bug (using {status:'active', approved:True, billable:True} instead of the production filter) is verified resolved: simulator now uses {is_active != False, pending_approval != True, subscription_status not in [past_due, canceled, unpaid, incomplete]} and returns a 122-therapist pool (test_therapist_pool_nonzero passes).
